meta.summary: BEDOPS 2.4.42 command-line runtime for sorted BED set operations, element mapping, Starch archive compression, and common genomic interval format conversion.
meta.description: BEDOPS 2.4.42 command-line runtime for sorted BED set operations, element mapping, Starch archive compression, and common genomic interval format conversion.

test: bedops --version 2>&1 | grep -F "2.4.42" >/dev/null && sort-bed --version 2>&1 | grep -F "2.4.42" >/dev/null && bedmap --version 2>&1 | grep -F "2.4.42" >/dev/null && starch --version 2>&1 | grep -F "2.4.42" >/dev/null

bedops --help 2>&1 | grep -F "USAGE: bedops" >/dev/null && bedmap --help 2>&1 | grep -F "USAGE: bedmap" >/dev/null && closest-features --help 2>&1 | grep -F "USAGE: closest-features" >/dev/null && convert2bed --help 2>&1 | grep -F "convert2bed" >/dev/null && bam2bed_gnuParallel --help 2>&1 | grep -F "GNU Parallel" >/dev/null

python3 -m py_compile /opt/bedops/bin/starch-diff /opt/bedops/bin/update-sort-bed-slurm /opt/bedops/bin/update-sort-bed-starch-slurm /opt/bedops/bin/update-sort-bed-migrate-candidates && starch-diff --help 2>&1 | grep -F "Starch v2.2+ archives" >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-bedops-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; printf 'chr1	10	20	a
chr1	1	5	b
chr2	3	8	c
' > "$tmp/input.bed"; sort-bed "$tmp/input.bed" > "$tmp/sorted.bed"; awk 'NR==1 && $1=="chr1" && $2==1 && $3==5 && $4=="b" {ok=1} END{exit ok?0:1}' "$tmp/sorted.bed"; printf 'chr1	4	12	x
' | sort-bed - > "$tmp/ref.bed"; bedops --intersect "$tmp/sorted.bed" "$tmp/ref.bed" > "$tmp/intersect.bed"; test "$(wc -l < "$tmp/intersect.bed")" -eq 2; bedmap --echo --count "$tmp/ref.bed" "$tmp/sorted.bed" > "$tmp/map.txt"; grep -F "chr1" "$tmp/map.txt" >/dev/null; grep -F "|2" "$tmp/map.txt" >/dev/null; starch "$tmp/sorted.bed" > "$tmp/sorted.starch"; unstarch "$tmp/sorted.starch" > "$tmp/recovered.bed"; diff -u "$tmp/sorted.bed" "$tmp/recovered.bed"; unstarch --list "$tmp/sorted.starch" | grep -F "chr1" >/dev/null; printf 'chr1	src	gene	2	10	.	+	.	ID=g1
' | gff2bed --do-not-sort > "$tmp/gff.bed"; grep -F "g1" "$tmp/gff.bed" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: BEDOPS
upstream.license: GPL-2.0-or-later; bundled third-party source archives retain their own upstream licenses
upstream.citation: Neph S, Kuehn MS, Reynolds AP, et al. BEDOPS: high-performance genomic feature operations. Bioinformatics. 2012;28(14):1919-1920.
